response.global_analysis: 1. JSON Match: Vocal segment (04:04-04:59) phonetically matches the provided lyrics for '言って。' (Itte.). 2. JSON Usage: The lyrics reference was used for the singing portion; the first 4 minutes of dialogue were transcribed manually. 3. Timing & Pacing: Subtitles are tightly anchored to vocal starts for the banter segment to capture the chaotic energy, with instantaneous transitions used during the fast-paced song intro.

subtitles.original: Oh yeah, because you guys know...
subtitles.english: Oh yeah, because you guys know...

subtitles.original: Don't look at the camera! Not this part! No!
subtitles.english: Don't look at the camera! Not this part! No!

subtitles.original: Wait! Wait! Before starting she said,
subtitles.english: Wait! Wait! Before starting she said,

subtitles.original: She said, "I'm so nervous, when I'm done..."
subtitles.english: She said, "I'm so nervous, when I'm done..."

subtitles.original: That hasn't happened! What? Thank you?
subtitles.english: That hasn't happened! What? Thank you?

subtitles.original: You know my data for the payment, okay?
subtitles.english: You know my data for the payment, okay?

subtitles.original: I don't want to send you money anymore!
subtitles.english: I don't want to send you money anymore!

subtitles.original: You owe me 40 pounds already, mate. Front taxes, okay?
subtitles.english: You owe me 40 pounds already, mate. Front taxes, okay?

subtitles.original: She's so in debt with me! And she takes...
subtitles.english: She's so in debt with me! And she takes...

subtitles.original: This is really bad of you!
subtitles.english: This is really bad of you!

subtitles.original: It's my birthday, I decide what I want, I decide everything!
subtitles.english: It's my birthday, I decide what I want, I decide everything!

subtitles.original: And if I want 10 dollars, you're gonna give me 10 dollars!
subtitles.english: And if I want 10 dollars, you're gonna give me 10 dollars!

subtitles.original: What should I do? The drama...
subtitles.english: What should I do? The drama...

subtitles.original: Chatini, tell her to give me the 10 dollars!
subtitles.english: Chatini, tell her to give me the 10 dollars!

subtitles.original: You look so determined! You really want this money...
subtitles.english: You look so determined! You really want this money...

subtitles.original: Here it is! Just buy yourself some cannoli or something!
subtitles.english: Here it is! Just buy yourself some cannoli or something!

subtitles.original: I'm over it! I'm so done! Live on stream!
subtitles.english: I'm over it! I'm so done! Live on stream!

subtitles.original: The mortgage... the car... the insurance...
subtitles.english: The mortgage... the car... the insurance...

subtitles.original: Don't talk about negative things now!
subtitles.english: Don't talk about negative things now!

subtitles.original: Because today is my birthday! We gotta celebrate!
subtitles.english: Because today is my birthday! We gotta celebrate!

subtitles.original: Did you bring cake for us?
subtitles.english: Did you bring cake for us?

subtitles.original: Where is it? Actually? The cake?
subtitles.english: Where is it? Actually? The cake?

subtitles.original: I... I can't tell right now...
subtitles.english: I... I can't tell right now...

subtitles.original: It's in the drawing! It's in the drawing!
subtitles.english: It's in the drawing! It's in the drawing!

subtitles.original: Ah! No! Don't touch my tail!
subtitles.english: Ah! No! Don't touch my tail!

subtitles.original: Hey, hey! I grabbed your tail!
subtitles.english: Hey, hey! I grabbed your tail!

subtitles.original: It's kind of easy to grab, it's very long.
subtitles.english: It's kind of easy to grab, it's very long.

subtitles.original: Listen, listen! You need to walk,
subtitles.english: Listen, listen! You need to walk,

subtitles.original: you need to run way faster if you want me to do more...
subtitles.english: you need to run way faster if you want me to do more...

subtitles.original: Oh you know what? Then I'll grab yours!
subtitles.english: Oh you know what? Then I'll grab yours!

subtitles.original: Here it comes! You cannot... it's her!
subtitles.english: Here it comes! You cannot... it's her!

subtitles.original: Oh, what are we doing now?
subtitles.english: Oh, what are we doing now?

subtitles.original: And she's not gonna be happy with this...
subtitles.english: And she's not gonna be happy with this...

subtitles.original: You know what? I'm gonna go and talk to your manager by myself!
subtitles.english: You know what? I'm gonna go and talk to your manager by myself!

subtitles.original: No, you cannot talk to my manager!
subtitles.english: No, you cannot talk to my manager!

subtitles.original: We really did deserve cake after all.
subtitles.english: We really did deserve cake after all.

subtitles.original: Haha, we deserve cake after all, isn't it?
subtitles.english: Haha, we deserve cake after all, isn't it?

subtitles.original: Okay, we have to go now! We have to go!
subtitles.english: Okay, we have to go now! We have to go!

subtitles.original: There's more to come! There's so much more!
subtitles.english: There's more to come! There's so much more!

subtitles.original: She has so many surprises for you!
subtitles.english: She has so many surprises for you!

subtitles.original: She does, she does, she does!
subtitles.english: She does, she does, she does!

subtitles.original: So thank you so much! Happy Birthday Raora!
subtitles.english: So thank you so much! Happy Birthday Raora!

subtitles.original: Rico! Thank you for having me here!
subtitles.english: Rico! Thank you for having me here!

subtitles.original: Actually talking about colors, you should put some colors on!
subtitles.english: Actually talking about colors, you should put some colors on!

subtitles.original: Well, I bought some new glasses, they're nice and red,
subtitles.english: Well, I bought some new glasses, they're nice and red,

subtitles.original: you should see them, I'll show you sometime soon!
subtitles.english: you should see them, I'll show you sometime soon!

subtitles.original: More songs to come! Happy Birthday!
subtitles.english: More songs to come! Happy Birthday!

subtitles.original: 私 実は気付いてるの

subtitles.english: Look, about that thing you said

subtitles.original: 考えたいと思えなくて

subtitles.english: So I had forgotten about it, but

subtitles.original: 盲目的に盲動的に妄想的に生きて
衝動的な焦燥的な消極的なままじゃ駄目だったんだ
